title: Plasticizer-Free Gradient-Crosslinked Polyurethane Electrolyte for Room-Temperature Solid-State <mark>Lithium</mark> Batteries
authors: Nan Wang, Dean Yen, Xiaohu Zhang, Guang Yang, Michelle Lehmann, Yugang Zhang, Gao Liu and Enyuan Hu
abstract: Polymer-based solid-state electrolytes are promising for next-generation <mark>lithium</mark> metal batteries, yet their limited <mark>ionic conductivity</mark> and mechanical stability at ambient conditions remain key challenges. Herein, we report a novel gradient crosslinked polymer electrolyte (PU/PUA/PU) synthesized via a sequential in situ UV-curing process that integrates a mechanically robust polyurethane acrylate (PUA) core with soft linear polyurethane (PU) interfaces. This all-solid membrane operates without any liquid plasticizer and the interfacial PU layers ensure low interfacial resistance and intimate el…
